---
title: "02 - Functional Enrichment (EnrichR)"
author: "Jay Nagabhairu"
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(enrichR)
library(openxlsx)
```

Takes the top differentially expressed genes from step 01 and tests them against
~30 curated gene-set libraries (KEGG, GO BP, Reactome, WikiPathways, BioPlanet,
MSigDB Hallmark, ...) via the EnrichR API.

## Load step 01 results

```{r load}
de_dir <- here("results", "differential_expression")

pre_s1_ttest <- read.csv(gzfile(file.path(de_dir, "DE_precancer_vs_stage1_full.csv.gz")),
                         stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
s2_s1_ttest  <- read.csv(gzfile(file.path(de_dir, "DE_stage1_vs_stage2_full.csv.gz")),
                         stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
```

## Extract gene symbols from "ILMN_xxxxxxx|SYMBOL" feature ids

```{r symbols}
funcSplit <- function(rep_gene) {
  parts <- unlist(strsplit(rep_gene, split = "|", fixed = TRUE))
  parts[2]
}

pre_s1_ttest$Gene <- vapply(pre_s1_ttest$Feature, funcSplit, character(1))
s2_s1_ttest$Gene  <- vapply(s2_s1_ttest$Feature,  funcSplit, character(1))
```

## Take the top 1,000 genes per comparison

```{r top-genes}
max_genes <- 1000

s1vPre_degs <- pre_s1_ttest %>%
  filter(!is.na(Pvalue)) %>% arrange(Pvalue) %>%
  slice(1:max_genes) %>% select(Gene) %>% distinct()

s2vs1_degs <- s2_s1_ttest %>%
  filter(!is.na(Pvalue)) %>% arrange(Pvalue) %>%
  slice(1:max_genes) %>% select(Gene) %>% distinct()

enr_dir <- here("results", "enrichment")
if (!dir.exists(enr_dir)) dir.create(enr_dir, recursive = TRUE)
write.csv(s1vPre_degs, file.path(enr_dir, "Filtered_DEGs_s1vPre.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(s2vs1_degs,  file.path(enr_dir, "Filtered_DEGs_s2vs1norm.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
```

## Run enrichment across all libraries

```{r enrichment, eval=FALSE}
# eval=FALSE by default because it calls the live EnrichR API. Set eval=TRUE to run.
source(here("R", "functionEnrichment.R"))

dblist <- read.csv(here("data", "EnrichR-Databases-2023.txt"),
                   header = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

functionEnrichment(dblist, s1vPre_degs,
                   file.path(enr_dir, "s1vPre_EnrichR.xlsx"))
functionEnrichment(dblist, s2vs1_degs,
                   file.path(enr_dir, "s2vs1norm_EnrichR.xlsx"))
```
